name: @elizaos-plugins/plugin-nostr
description: Nostr decentralized messaging plugin for elizaOS agents

scripts.build: npm run build:typescript && npm run build:python
scripts.build:python: test -n "$SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD" && echo 'Python build skipped (SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD set)' || (test -d python && cd python && timeout 120 pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python build skipped or timed out')
scripts.test: npm run test:typescript && npm run test:python && npm run test:rust
scripts.lint: npm run lint:typescript && npm run lint:python

author: elizaOS

NOSTR_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key in hex or nsec format for signing events

NOSTR_RELAYS.description: Comma-separated list of relay WebSocket URLs

NOSTR_DM_POLICY.description: DM policy: open, pairing, allowlist, or disabled

NOSTR_ALLOW_FROM.description: Comma-separated list of allowed pubkeys (npub or hex)

NOSTR_ENABLED.description: Enable or disable the Nostr plugin
